name: Circle
summary: Represents a circle in 3D. The values used are a radius and an orthonormal frame of the plane containing the circle, with origin at the center.The circle is parameterized by radians from 0 to 2 Pi given byt -> center + cos(t)*radius*xaxis + sin(t)*radius*yaxiswhere center, xaxis and yaxis define the orthonormal frame of the circle plane.
remarks: >An IsValid circle has positive radius and an IsValid plane defining the frame.

constructors.name: Circle(Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle with center (0,0,0) in the world XY plane.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of circle, should be a positive number.

constructors.name: Circle(Arc)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle from an arc.

params.name: arc
params.doc: Arc that defines the plane and radius.

constructors.name: Circle(Plane, Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle on a plane with a given radius.

params.name: plane
params.doc: Plane of circle. Plane origin defines the center of the circle.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of circle (should be a positive value).

constructors.name: Circle(Point3d, Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle parallel to the world XY plane with given center and radius.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of circle (should be a positive value).

constructors.name: Circle(Plane, Point3d, Double)
constructors.signature: public Circle(Plane plane, Point3d center, double radius)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle parallel to a given plane with given center and radius.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of circle (should be a positive value).

constructors.name: Circle(Point3d, Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Circle(Point3d point1, Point3d point2, Point3d point3)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle through three 3d points.

params.name: point1
params.doc: The start/end of the circle is at point1.

constructors.name: Circle(Point3d, Vector3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Circle(Point3d startPoint, Vector3d tangentAtP, Point3d pointOnCircle)
constructors.summary: Initializes a circle from two 3d points and a tangent at the first point. The start/end of the circle is at point "startPoint".

methods.name: ClosestParameter
methods.signature: public bool ClosestParameter(Point3d testPoint, out double t)
methods.summary: Gets the parameter on the circle which is closest to a test point.

params.name: testPoint
params.doc: Point to project onto the circle.

params.name: t
params.doc: Parameter on circle closes to testPoint.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ClosestPoint
methods.summary: Gets the point on the circle which is closest to a test point.

params.name: testPoint
params.doc: Point to project onto the circle.

returns.doc: The point on the circle that is closest to testPoint or Point3d.Unset on failure.

methods.name: DerivativeAt
methods.signature: public Vector3d DerivativeAt(int derivative, double t)
methods.summary: Determines the value of the Nth derivative at a parameter.

params.name: derivative
params.doc: Which order of derivative is wanted.

params.name: t
params.doc: Parameter to evaluate derivative. Valid values are 0, 1, 2 and 3.

returns.doc: The derivative of the circle at the given parameter.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Circle other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: IsInPlane
methods.signature: public bool IsInPlane(Plane plane, double tolerance)
methods.summary: Evaluates whether or not this circle is co-planar with a given plane.

returns.doc: true if the circle plane is co-planar with the given plane within tolerance.

methods.name: PointAt
methods.summary: Circles use trigonometric parameterization: t -> center + cos(t)*radius*xaxis + sin(t)*radius*yaxis.

returns.doc: The point on the circle at the given parameter.

methods.name: Reverse
methods.summary: Reverse the orientation of the circle. Changes the domain from [a,b] to [-b,-a].

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Vector3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angle, Vector3d axis)
methods.summary: Rotates the circle through a given angle.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Vector3d, Point3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angle, Vector3d axis, Point3d point)
methods.summary: Rotates the circle through a given angle.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Double, Vector3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double sinAngle, double cosAngle, Vector3d axis)
methods.summary: Rotates the circle around an axis that starts at the base plane origin.

params.name: sinAngle
params.doc: The value returned by Math.Sin(angle) to compose the rotation.

params.name: cosAngle
params.doc: The value returned by Math.Cos(angle) to compose the rotation.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Rotate(Double, Double, Vector3d, Point3d)
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double sinAngle, double cosAngle, Vector3d axis, Point3d point)
methods.summary: Rotates the circle around an axis that starts at the provided point.

params.name: sinAngle
params.doc: The value returned by Math.Sin(angle) to compose the rotation.

params.name: cosAngle
params.doc: The value returned by Math.Cos(angle) to compose the rotation.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: TangentAt
methods.summary: Circles use trigonometric parameterization: t -> center + cos(t)*radius*xaxis + sin(t)*radius*yaxis.

returns.doc: The tangent at the circle at the given parameter.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve()
methods.summary: Constructs a nurbs curve representation of this circle. This amounts to the same as calling NurbsCurve.CreateFromCircle().

returns.doc: A nurbs curve representation of this circle or null if no such representation could be made.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve(Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public NurbsCurve ToNurbsCurve(int degree, int cvCount)
methods.summary: Create a uniform non-rational cubic NURBS approximation of a circle.

returns.doc: NURBS curve approximation of a circle on success

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms this circle using an transformation matrix.
methods.remarks: Circles may not be transformed accurately if the transformation defines a non-euclidean transformation.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.
true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: TryFitCircleToPoints
methods.signature: public static bool TryFitCircleToPoints(IEnumerable<Point3d> points, out Circle circle)
methods.summary: Attempt to fit a circle through a set of points.

params.name: points
params.doc: The points through which to fit.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: TryFitCircleTT
methods.signature: public static Circle TryFitCircleTT(Curve c1, Curve c2, double t1, double t2)
methods.summary: Try to fit a circle to two curves using tangent relationships.

params.name: t1
params.doc: Parameter on first curve close to desired solution.

params.name: t2
params.doc: Parameter on second curve closet to desired solution.

returns.doc: Valid circle on success, Circle.Unset on failure.

methods.name: TryFitCircleTTT
methods.signature: public static Circle TryFitCircleTTT(Curve c1, Curve c2, Curve c3, double t1, double t2, double t3)
methods.summary: Try to fit a circle to three curves using tangent relationships.

params.name: t1
params.doc: Parameter on first curve close to desired solution.

params.name: t2
params.doc: Parameter on second curve closet to desired solution.

params.name: t3
params.doc: Parameter on third curve close to desired solution.

returns.doc: Valid circle on success, Circle.Unset on failure.

properties.name: BoundingBox
properties.summary: Gets the circle's 3d axis aligned bounding box.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets or sets the center point of this circle.

properties.name: Circumference
properties.summary: Gets or sets the circumference of this circle.

properties.name: Diameter
properties.summary: Gets or sets the diameter (radius * 2.0) of this circle. Diameters should be positive values.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: A valid circle has radius larger than 0.0 and a base plane which is must also be valid.

properties.name: Normal
properties.summary: Gets the normal vector for this circle.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the plane of the circle.

properties.name: Radius
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius of this circle. Radii should be positive values.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets a circle with Unset components.
